title: Add search system with service, API route, helpers, and caching
description: Create a complete search system with four new components: (1) searchService.ts in src/services/ for full-text search using Payload, (2) search.ts API route in src/routes/ with query parameter handling, (3) searchHelpers.ts utility in src/utils/ for query building, and (4) searchCache.ts middleware in src/middleware/ for caching layer. Reuse existing patterns from course-search.ts service, Cache class, and route middleware patterns.
existing_patterns: src/services/course-search.ts - Payload-based search service with filters, pagination, and typed interfaces
src/utils/cache.ts - Cache class with TTL, LRU eviction, and stats tracking
src/app/api/courses/search/route.ts - Next.js route handler with withAuth, query param parsing, input validation, and sanitization
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - Middleware pattern with config-based factory function returning chainable handler
